final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing infographic showing step-by-step instructions for deploying Hermes in a Docker container and integrating it with GLMCodingPlan.

Style/medium: clean flat vector infographic, technical documentation style, minimal icons, step-by-step flowchart aesthetic
Composition: vertical layout with 4 numbered steps stacked top-to-bottom, each step in its own bordered card with icon and text
Subject: four instructional steps labeled 1-2-3-4, Docker container deployment workflow, Hermes integration with GLMCodingPlan
Scene/backdrop: clean white or light gray background, subtle grid pattern for technical feel
Color palette: cool blue for Docker branding, warm orange for step numbers, neutral gray for text, green for success/check indicators
Text (verbatim): "1", "2", "3", "4", "docker", "hermes", "glmcodingplan"
Constraints: numbers must be prominently displayed in sequence; icons must be simple and recognizable; text must be readable at small sizes
Avoid: 3D renders; photorealistic textures; cluttered layouts; decorative flourishes; gradients unless essential for hierarchy
